name: Rhubarb Dream Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour and sugar in a bowl. Cut in butter until crumbs form.
2. Press the mixture into the bottom of a jelly roll pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes.
4. In another bowl, blend eggs, granulated sugar, all-purpose flour, and salt.
5. Fold in rhubarb.
6. Spread the filling over the crust.
7. Bake at 350°F for 40-45 minutes.
8. Cool, then cut into squares.
